═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 🔧 KONFIGURACE BEZPEČNOSTI # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ app = Flask(__name__) app.secret_key = secrets.token_hex(32) # 256-bit klíč # Bezpečná konfigurace session cookies app.config.update( SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=True, # Pouze HTTPS (v produkci) SESSION_COOKIE_HTTPONLY=True, # 🔒 Blokuje JavaScript přístup SESSION_COOKIE_SAMESITE='Strict', # 🔒 CSRF ochrana SESSION_COOKIE_NAME='__Secure-SessionID', # Bezpečný název PERMANENT_SESSION_LIFETIME=timedelta(minutes=30), SESSION_REFRESH_EACH_REQUEST=True ) # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 📝 LOGGING & MONITORING # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ logging.basicConfig( level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s', handlers=[ logging.FileHandler('security.log'), logging.StreamHandler() ] ) security_logger = logging.getLogger('security') class SecurityMonitor: """Real-time detekce anomálií""" def __init__(self): self.failed_attempts = defaultdict(list) self.suspicious_patterns = defaultdict(int) self.blocked_ips = set() def log_attempt(self, ip, event_type, details): """Zaznamenání bezpečnostní události""" timestamp = time.time() self.failed_attempts[ip].append({ 'time': timestamp, 'type': event_type, 'details': details }) # Cleanup starých záznamů (> 1 hodina) self.failed_attempts[ip] = [ a for a in self.failed_attempts[ip] if timestamp - a['time'] < 3600 ] # Detekce útoku if len(self.failed_attempts[ip]) > 10: self.block_ip(ip, event_type) def block_ip(self, ip, reason): """Blokování podezřelé IP""" self.blocked_ips.add(ip) security_logger.critical( f"🚨 BLOCKED IP: {ip} | Reason: {reason} | " f"Attempts: {len(self.failed_attempts[ip])}" ) def is_blocked(self, ip): return ip in self.blocked_ips monitor = SecurityMonitor() # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 🔒 SECURITY HEADERS (Talisman) # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ csp = { 'default-src': "'self'", 'script-src': "'self'", # 🔒 Blokuje inline JS 'style-src': "'self' 'unsafe-inline'", 'img-src': "'self' data:", 'connect-src': "'self'", # 🔒 Blokuje exfiltraci na cizí domény 'frame-ancestors': "'none'", # Clickjacking ochrana 'base-uri': "'self'", 'form-action': "'self'" } Talisman(app, content_security_policy=csp, content_security_policy_nonce_in=['script-src'], force_https=False, # Pro localhost, v produkci True strict_transport_security=True, session_cookie_secure=False # Pro localhost, v produkci True ) # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 🚦 RATE LIMITING # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ limiter = Limiter( app=app, key_func=get_remote_address, default_limits=["200 per day", "50 per hour"], storage_uri="memory://" ) # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 🤖 BOT DETECTION # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ SUSPICIOUS_USER_AGENTS = [ r'selenium', r'puppeteer', r'headless', r'phantomjs', r'bot', r'crawler', r'spider', r'scraper', r'curl', r'wget' ] def is_suspicious_agent(user_agent): """Detekce automatizovaných agentů""" if not user_agent: return True ua_lower = user_agent.lower() return any(re.search(pattern, ua_lower) for pattern in SUSPICIOUS_USER_AGENTS) def detect_automation_patterns(request): """Detekce automatizovaného chování""" suspicious_score = 0 reasons = [] # 1. Chybějící nebo podezřelý User-Agent ua = request.headers.get('User-Agent', '') if is_suspicious_agent(ua): suspicious_score += 3 reasons.append(f"Suspicious UA: {ua}") # 2. Chybějící běžné hlavičky prohlížeče expected_headers = ['Accept', 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding'] missing = [h for h in expected_headers if h not in request.headers] if missing: suspicious_score += len(missing) reasons.append(f"Missing headers: {missing}") # 3.
